ns0:entry.ns0:title: HQarroum/docker-android
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HQarroum/docker-android
Language: shell
🤖 A minimal and customizable Docker image running the Android emulator as a service.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HariSekhon/DevOps-Bash-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HariSekhon/DevOps-Bash-tools
Language: shell
1000+ DevOps Bash Scripts - AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, APIs, SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hive, Impala, Kafka, Hadoop, Jenkins, GitHub, GitLab, BitBucket, Azure DevOps, TeamCity, Spotify, MP3, LDAP, Code/Build Linting, pkg mgmt for Linux, Mac, Python, Perl, Ruby, NodeJS, Golang, Advanced dotfiles: .bashrc, .vimrc, .gitconfig, .screenrc, tmux..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhatsApp/proxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhatsApp/proxy
Language: shell
This repository contains the WhatsApp proxy implementation for users to host their own proxy infrastructure to connect to WhatsApp for chat (VoIP is not currently supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
Language: shell
Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eugr/spark-vllm-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eugr/spark-vllm-docker
Language: shell
Docker configuration for running VLLM on dual DGX Sparks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glittercowboy/taches-cc-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glittercowboy/taches-cc-resources
Language: shell
A collection of my favorite custom Claude Code resources to make life easier.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kholia/OSX-KVM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kholia/OSX-KVM
Language: shell
Run macOS on QEMU/KVM. With OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma support now! Only commercial (paid) support is available now to avoid spammy issues. No Mac system is required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
Language: shell
Supports running Armbian on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pi-hole/pi-hole
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pi-hole/pi-hole
Language: shell
A black hole for Internet advertisements

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ublue-os/bazzite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ublue-os/bazzite
Language: shell
Bazzite makes gaming and everyday use smoother and simpler across desktop PCs, handhelds, tablets, and home theater PCs.
